```
import type {
  GalleryImage,
  GalleryRendererProps,
  SlashMenuItemConfig,
} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { createRendererDecoration } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
} from 'lexical'
import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
import { Images } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { GalleryRenderer } from './GalleryRenderer'
import {
  GalleryNode,
  type GalleryNodePayload,
  type SerializedGalleryNode,
} from './GalleryNode'

export class GalleryEditNode extends GalleryNode {
  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Gallery',
      icon: createElement(Images, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Image gallery grid',
      keywords: ['gallery', 'images', 'grid'],
      section: 'MEDIA',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createGalleryEditNode({ images: [] })])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static clone(node: GalleryEditNode): GalleryEditNode {
    return new GalleryEditNode(
      {
        images: node.__images.map((img) => ({ ...img })),
        layout: node.__layout,
      },
      node.__key,
    )
  }

  constructor(payload: GalleryNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(payload, key)
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGalleryNode): GalleryEditNode {
    return new GalleryEditNode({
      images: serializedNode.images,
      layout: serializedNode.layout,
    })
  }

  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    const nodeKey = this.__key
    const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
      images: this.__images,
      layout: this.__layout,
      onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
          if (node) node.setImages(images)
        })
      },
      onLayoutChange: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => {
        editor.update(() => {
          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
          if (node) node.setLayout(layout)
        })
      },
    }
    return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
  }
}

export function $createGalleryEditNode(
  payload: GalleryNodePayload,
): GalleryEditNode {
  return new GalleryEditNode(payload)
}

export function $isGalleryEditNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is GalleryEditNode {
  return node instanceof GalleryEditNode
}
```

```
import type {
  GalleryImage,
  GalleryRendererProps,
} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { createRendererDecoration } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'

import { GalleryRenderer } from './GalleryRenderer'

export type SerializedGalleryNode = Spread<
  {
    images: GalleryImage[]
    layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export interface GalleryNodePayload {
  images: GalleryImage[]
  layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
}

export class GalleryNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __images: GalleryImage[]
  __layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'

  static getType(): string {
    return 'gallery'
  }

  static clone(node: GalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    return new GalleryNode(
      {
        images: node.__images.map((img) => ({ ...img })),
        layout: node.__layout,
      },
      node.__key,
    )
  }

  constructor(payload: GalleryNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__images = payload.images
    this.__layout = payload.layout || 'grid'
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = `rich-gallery rich-gallery-${this.__layout}`
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    return $createGalleryNode({
      images: serializedNode.images,
      layout: serializedNode.layout,
    })
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedGalleryNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'gallery',
      images: this.__images,
      layout: this.__layout,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  getImages(): GalleryImage[] {
    return this.getLatest().__images
  }

  setImages(images: GalleryImage[]): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__images = images
  }

  getLayout(): 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel' {
    return this.getLatest().__layout
  }

  setLayout(layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__layout = layout
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
      images: this.__images,
      layout: this.__layout,
    }
    return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
  }
}

export function $createGalleryNode(payload: GalleryNodePayload): GalleryNode {
  return new GalleryNode(payload)
}

export function $isGalleryNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is GalleryNode {
  return node instanceof GalleryNode
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor, LexicalNode, NodeKey } from 'lexical'
import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'

import { TldrawNode, type SerializedTldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'

const LazyDisplayRenderer = lazy(() =>
  import('./TldrawDisplayRenderer').then((m) => ({
    default: m.TldrawDisplayRenderer,
  })),
)
const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
  })),
)

export class TldrawEditNode extends TldrawNode {
  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Whiteboard',
      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
      section: 'MEDIA',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createTldrawEditNode('{}')])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static clone(node: TldrawEditNode): TldrawEditNode {
    return new TldrawEditNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(snapshot, key)
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawEditNode {
    return new TldrawEditNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
  }

  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    const nodeKey = this.__key
    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()

    const fallback = createElement('div', {
      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
      style: {
        position: 'relative',
        width: '100%',
        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
        margin: '1rem 0',
      },
    })

    if (isEditable) {
      return createElement(
        Suspense,
        { fallback },
        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
            editor.update(() => {
              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
              if (node) {
                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
              }
            })
          },
        }),
      )
    }

    return createElement(
      Suspense,
      { fallback },
      createElement(LazyDisplayRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
    )
  }
}

export function $createTldrawEditNode(snapshot: string): TldrawEditNode {
  return new TldrawEditNode(snapshot)
}

export function $isTldrawEditNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is TldrawEditNode {
  return node instanceof TldrawEditNode
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { presentDialog } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
import { Component, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'
import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'

export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
  snapshot: string
}

export const TldrawDisplayRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
  snapshot,
}) => {
  const theme = useColorScheme()
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (hasEnteredView) return
    const target = containerRef.current
    if (!target) return

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
          setHasEnteredView(true)
          observer.disconnect()
        }
      },
      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    )
    observer.observe(target)
    return () => observer.disconnect()
  }, [hasEnteredView])

  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    return (
      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div ref={containerRef}>
      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    </div>
  )
}

// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---

const TldrawExpandContent: FC<{
  dismiss: () => void
  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
  data: Record<string, any>
  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
}> = ({ dismiss, TldrawComponent, data, theme }) => (
  <>
    <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
      <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
      <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
      <button type="button" className={css.tldrawHeaderClose} onClick={dismiss}>
        <X size={18} />
      </button>
    </div>
    <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
      <TldrawComponent
        snapshot={data}
        hideUi
        onMount={(editor: any) => {
          editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
          editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
          editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })

const TldrawStaticCanvas: FC<{

      })

  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (editorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
      editorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    }
  }, [theme])

  const handleMount = useCallback(
    (editor: any) => {
      editorRef.current = editor

      </div>
    )
  }

      </div>
    )
  }

  if (!TldrawComponent) {
    return (
      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
        <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to load tldraw</div>
      </div>
    )
  }
```

```
class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
  { hasError: boolean }
> {
  state = { hasError: false }
  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
    return { hasError: true }
  }
  render() {
    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
  }
}
```

```
import type { FC } from 'react'

export interface TldrawSSRRendererProps {
  snapshot: string
}

export const TldrawSSRRenderer: FC<TldrawSSRRendererProps> = ({ snapshot }) => {
  let label = 'Tldraw Whiteboard'
  try {
    const data = JSON.parse(snapshot)
    if (data && typeof data === 'object') {
      const shapeCount = Object.keys(data).filter((k) =>
        k.startsWith('shape:'),
      ).length
      if (shapeCount > 0) {
        label = `Tldraw Whiteboard (${shapeCount} shapes)`
      }
    }
  } catch {
    // snapshot might be a URL ref or invalid JSON — show generic placeholder
  }

  return (
    <div
      className="rich-tldraw-ssr-placeholder"
      style={{
        position: 'relative',
        width: '100%',
        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        backgroundColor: 'var(--rich-tldraw-bg, #f5f5f5)',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        border: '1px solid var(--rich-tldraw-border, #e5e5e5)',
        color: 'var(--rich-tldraw-fg, #737373)',
        fontSize: '14px',
      }}
      aria-label={label}
    >
      <span>{label}</span>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```
const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000

// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────

const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
  dismiss: () => void
  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
  initialSnapshot: string

}> = ({

  initialSnapshot,

  saveSnapshot,
  onClose,
}) => {
  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
      return 'inline'
    try {
      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
      return 'inline'
    } catch {
      return 'remote'
    }
  })
  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    try {
      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
      return ''
    } catch {
      return initialSnapshot
    }
  })
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    }
  }, [])

  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    const editor = editorRef.current
    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    try {
      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
        setIsSaving(true)
        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
          (ref) => {
            onSave(ref)
            isDirtyRef.current = false
            setIsDirty(false)
            setIsSaving(false)
            setSavedRef(ref)
          },
          () => {
            setIsSaving(false)
          },
        )
      } else {
        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
        isDirtyRef.current = false
        setIsDirty(false)
      }
    } catch {
      // ignore
    }
    return Promise.resolve()
  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])

  const handleMount = useCallback(
    (editor: any) => {
      editorRef.current = editor
      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
      editor.store.listen(
        () => {
          isDirtyRef.current = true
          setIsDirty(true)
          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
            () => performSave(),
            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
          )
        },
        { scope: 'document' },
      )
    },
    [theme, performSave],
  )

  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
    void performSave().then(() => {
      const editor = editorRef.current
      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
      dismiss()
    })
  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])

    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    dismiss()
  }, [dismiss])

    presentDialog({
      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
      description:
        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>

            type="button"
            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
            onClick={dismissConfirm}

              handleDiscard()
            }}
          >
            Discard
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
            onClick={() => {
              dismissConfirm()
              handleSaveAndClose()
```

```
    className,

  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue

  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    () => new Map(plugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    [plugins],
  )

  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    plugins,
  )
  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id
  const matchedFullUrl = urlMatch?.match.fullUrl

  const useDynamicFetch = !!source && !!id
  const selectedPlugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    source,
    plugin: selectedPlugin,
    id: id || '',
    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
    context: fetchContext,
  })

  const typeClass = selectedPlugin?.typeClass
  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
    : ''

  const finalTitle = cardInfo?.title || title || url
  const finalDesc = cardInfo?.desc || description
  const finalImage = cardInfo?.image || image
  const finalColor = cardInfo?.color
  const classNames = cardInfo?.classNames || {}
  const mappedCardRootClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.cardRoot)
  const mappedImageClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.image)

  const [shortDesc, setShortDesc] = useState(false)
  const descRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const el = descRef.current
    if (!el || !finalDesc) {
      setShortDesc(false)
      return
    }
    const style = getComputedStyle(el)
    const lineHeight = Number.parseFloat(style.lineHeight) || 1.5 * 14
    const maxTwoLines = lineHeight * 2
    setShortDesc(el.scrollHeight <= maxTwoLines + 1)
  }, [finalDesc, finalTitle])

  if (useDynamicFetch && !isValid) {
    return null
  }

  if (useDynamicFetch && loading) {
    return (
      <a
        data-hide-print
        ref={ref}
        href={fullUrl}
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener noreferrer"
      >
        <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
      </a>
    )
  }

  const hasImage = !!finalImage
  const showImagePlaceholder = useDynamicFetch && isError && !hasImage

  return (
    <a
      data-hide-print
      ref={useDynamicFetch ? ref : undefined}
      className={[
        styles.card,
        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
        typeStyleClass,
        typeSemanticClass,
```
</details></tool-use>

```
import type { MermaidRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { FC } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'
import { useMermaidRender } from './useMermaidRender'

export const MermaidRenderer: FC<MermaidRendererProps> = ({ content }) => {
  const { loading, error, imgSrc, width, height } = useMermaidRender(content)

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <pre className={css.mermaidLoading}>
        <code>{content}</code>
      </pre>
    )
  }

  if (!imgSrc) {
    return <div className={css.mermaidError}>{error || 'Render failed'}</div>
  }

  return (
    <div className={css.mermaidContainer} style={{ cursor: 'default' }}>
      <img src={imgSrc} alt="Mermaid diagram" width={width} height={height} />
    </div>
  )
}

export default MermaidRenderer
```
</details></tool-use>

```
import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import { RichSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import {
  codeSnippetNodes,
  embedNodes,
  enhancedRendererConfig,
  galleryNodes,
  TldrawNode,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import { useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawNode,
  ...embedNodes,
  ...galleryNodes,
  ...codeSnippetNodes,
]

export interface ShiroSSRRendererProps extends Omit<
  RichSSRRendererProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
}

export function ShiroSSRRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroSSRRendererProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  return (
    <RichSSRRenderer
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    />
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

- `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts:72` — Severity: High. The refactored `decorate` now always renders `TldrawSSRRenderer` and no longer checks `editor.isEditable()` or loads the editable renderer, but `TldrawNode` still exposes `$createTldrawNode`/`TldrawNode` (type “tldraw”). Any integration that hasn’t switched to the new `TldrawEditNode` (e.g., existing extra‑node registrations or saved content) will now only show the SSR placeholder and cannot be edited, so either the editable branch needs to stay in `TldrawNode` or every consumer must be guaranteed to replace it with `TldrawEditNode`.
